title: lastrea crenata
intro: Lastrea crenata, also known as the toothed fern, is a type of fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lastrea crenata include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health issues.
